revision.comment: include dormant category link in rcat template name + specify "rcat" template
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R to disambiguation page
  |name={{c|Redirects to disambiguation pages|To a disambiguation page}}
  |to=a disambiguation page
  |info=This redirect is intended for use in links from other articles that need to refer to the disambiguation page, rather than be disambiguated.  Therefore, '''this template should only appear on a redirect page that has "(disambiguation)" at the end of its title'''.  Ambiguous titles that do not have  page names ending with "(disambiguation)" should use {{tl|R from ambiguous term}} instead. For disambiguations that later prove to still be ambiguous (e.g. "(painter)" when there are multiple notable painters by the same name) and which redirect to disambiguation pages, then {{tl|R from incomplete disambiguation}} is the appropriate rcat template.
  |printworthy=no
}}<includeonly>{{Talk other|{{Incorrect redirect template|[[Help:Talk pages|talk]]||outside}}
|{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{#invoke:string|endswith|{{PAGENAME}}|(disambiguation)}}|[[Category:Redirects to disambiguation pages]]|{{Mbox|type=content|image=[[File:Stop hand orange.svg|50px]]|text={{Error|The above [[WP:RCAT|rcat]] should only be used to categorize redirects that have "(disambiguation)" in their title.}}}}[[Category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded disambiguation templates]]}}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R to disambiguation page
  |name={{c|Redirects to disambiguation pages|To a disambiguation page}}
  |to=a disambiguation page
  |info=This redirect is intended for use in links from other articles that need to refer to the disambiguation page, rather than be disambiguated.  Therefore, '''this template should only appear on a redirect page that has "(disambiguation)" at the end of its title'''.  Ambiguous titles that do not have  page names ending with "(disambiguation)" should use {{tl|R from ambiguous term}} instead. For disambiguations that later prove to still be ambiguous (e.g. "(painter)" when there are multiple notable painters by the same name) and which redirect to disambiguation pages, then {{tl|R from incomplete disambiguation}} is the appropriate rcat template.
  |printworthy=no
}}<includeonly>{{Talk other|{{Incorrect redirect template|[[Help:Talk pages|talk]]||outside}}
|{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{#invoke:string|endswith|{{PAGENAME}}|(disambiguation)}}|[[Category:Redirects to disambiguation pages]]|{{Mbox|type=content|image=[[File:Stop hand orange.svg|50px]]|text={{Error|The above [[WP:RCAT|rcat]] should only be used to categorize redirects that have "(disambiguation)" in their title.}}}}[[Category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded disambiguation templates]]}}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R to disambiguation page
  |name={{c|Redirects to disambiguation pages|To a disambiguation page}}
  |to=a disambiguation page
  |info=This redirect is intended for use in links from other articles that need to refer to the disambiguation page, rather than be disambiguated.  Therefore, '''this template should only appear on a redirect page that has "(disambiguation)" at the end of its title'''.  Ambiguous titles that do not have  page names ending with "(disambiguation)" should use {{tl|R from ambiguous term}} instead. For disambiguations that later prove to still be ambiguous (e.g. "(painter)" when there are multiple notable painters by the same name) and which redirect to disambiguation pages, then {{tl|R from incomplete disambiguation}} is the appropriate rcat template.
  |printworthy=no
}}<includeonly>{{Talk other|{{Incorrect redirect template|[[Help:Talk pages|talk]]||outside}}
|{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{#invoke:string|endswith|{{PAGENAME}}|(disambiguation)}}|[[Category:Redirects to disambiguation pages]]|{{Mbox|type=content|image=[[File:Stop hand orange.svg|50px]]|text={{Error|The above [[WP:RCAT|rcat]] should only be used to categorize redirects that have "(disambiguation)" in their title.}}}}[[Category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded disambiguation templates]]
[[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]]
}}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R to disambiguation page
  |name={{c|Redirects to disambiguation pages|To a disambiguation page}}
  |to=a disambiguation page
  |info=This redirect is intended for use in links from other articles that need to refer to the disambiguation page, rather than be disambiguated.  Therefore, '''this template should only appear on a redirect page that has "(disambiguation)" at the end of its title'''.  Ambiguous titles that do not have  page names ending with "(disambiguation)" should use {{tl|R from ambiguous term}} instead. For disambiguations that later prove to still be ambiguous (e.g. "(painter)" when there are multiple notable painters by the same name) and which redirect to disambiguation pages, then {{tl|R from incomplete disambiguation}} is the appropriate rcat template.
  |printworthy=no
}}<includeonly>{{Talk other|{{Incorrect redirect template|[[Help:Talk pages|talk]]||outside}}
|{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{#invoke:string|endswith|{{PAGENAME}}|(disambiguation)}}|[[Category:Redirects to disambiguation pages]]|{{Mbox|type=content|image=[[File:Stop hand orange.svg|50px]]|text={{Error|The above [[WP:RCAT|rcat]] should only be used to categorize redirects that have "(disambiguation)" in their title.}}}}[[Category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded disambiguation templates]]
[[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{{subst:PAGENAME}}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]]
}}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R to disambiguation page
  |name={{c|Redirects to disambiguation pages|To a disambiguation page}}
  |to=a disambiguation page
  |info=This redirect is intended for use in links from other articles that need to refer to the disambiguation page, rather than be disambiguated.  Therefore, '''this template should only appear on a redirect page that has "(disambiguation)" at the end of its title'''.  Ambiguous titles that do not have  page names ending with "(disambiguation)" should use {{tl|R from ambiguous term}} instead. For disambiguations that later prove to still be ambiguous (e.g. "(painter)" when there are multiple notable painters by the same name) and which redirect to disambiguation pages, then {{tl|R from incomplete disambiguation}} is the appropriate rcat template.
  |printworthy=no
}}<includeonly>{{Talk other|{{Incorrect redirect template|[[Help:Talk pages|talk]]||outside}}
|{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{#invoke:string|endswith|{{PAGENAME}}|(disambiguation)}}|[[Category:Redirects to disambiguation pages]]|{{Mbox|type=content|image=[[File:Stop hand orange.svg|50px]]|text={{Error|The above [[WP:RCAT|rcat]] should only be used to categorize redirects that have "(disambiguation)" in their title.}}}}[[Category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded disambiguation templates]]
[[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]]
}}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R to disambiguation page
  |name={{c|Redirects to disambiguation pages|To a disambiguation page}}
  |to=a disambiguation page
  |info=This redirect is intended for use in links from other articles that need to refer to the disambiguation page, rather than be disambiguated.  Therefore, '''this template should only appear on a redirect page that has "(disambiguation)" at the end of its title'''.  Ambiguous titles that do not have  page names ending with "(disambiguation)" should use {{tl|R from ambiguous term}} instead. For disambiguations that later prove to still be ambiguous (e.g. "(painter)" when there are multiple notable painters by the same name) and which redirect to disambiguation pages, then {{tl|R from incomplete disambiguation}} is the appropriate rcat template.
  |printworthy=no
}}<includeonly>{{Talk other|{{Incorrect redirect template|[[Help:Talk pages|talk]]||outside}}
|{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{#invoke:string|endswith|{{PAGENAME}}|(disambiguation)}}|[[Category:Redirects to disambiguation pages]]|{{Mbox|type=content|image=[[File:Stop hand orange.svg|50px]]|text={{Error|The above [[WP:RCAT|rcat]] should only be used to categorize redirects that have "(disambiguation)" in their title.}}}}[[Category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded disambiguation templates]]
[[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]]
}}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R to disambiguation page
  |name={{c|Redirects to disambiguation pages|To a disambiguation page}}
  |to=a disambiguation page
  |info=This redirect is intended for use in links from other articles that need to refer to the disambiguation page, rather than be disambiguated.  Therefore, '''this template should only appear on a redirect page that has "(disambiguation)" at the end of its title'''.  Ambiguous titles that do not have  page names ending with "(disambiguation)" should use {{tl|R from ambiguous term}} instead. For disambiguations that later prove to still be ambiguous (e.g. "(painter)" when there are multiple notable painters by the same name) and which redirect to disambiguation pages, then {{tl|R from incomplete disambiguation}} is the appropriate rcat template.
  |printworthy=no
}}<includeonly>{{Talk other|{{Incorrect redirect template|[[Help:Talk pages|talk]]||outside}}
|{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{#invoke:string|endswith|{{PAGENAME}}|(disambiguation)}}|[[Category:Redirects to disambiguation pages]]|{{Mbox|type=content|image=[[File:Stop hand orange.svg|50px]]|text={{Error|The above [[WP:RCAT|rcat]] should only be used to categorize redirects that have "(disambiguation)" in their title.}}}}[[Category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded disambiguation templates]]
[[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]]
}}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R to disambiguation page
  |name={{c|Redirects to disambiguation pages|To a disambiguation page}}
  |to=a disambiguation page
  |info=This redirect is intended for use in links from other articles that need to refer to the disambiguation page, rather than be disambiguated.  Therefore, '''this template should only appear on a redirect page that has "(disambiguation)" at the end of its title'''.  Ambiguous titles that do not have  page names ending with "(disambiguation)" should use {{tl|R from ambiguous term}} instead. For disambiguations that later prove to still be ambiguous (e.g. "(painter)" when there are multiple notable painters by the same name) and which redirect to disambiguation pages, then {{tl|R from incomplete disambiguation}} is the appropriate rcat template.
  |printworthy=no
}}<includeonly>{{Talk other|{{Incorrect redirect template|[[Help:Talk pages|talk]]||outside}}
|{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{#invoke:string|endswith|{{PAGENAME}}|(disambiguation)}}|[[Category:Redirects to disambiguation pages]]|{{Mbox|type=content|image=[[File:Stop hand orange.svg|50px]]|text={{Error|The above [[WP:RCAT|rcat]] should only be used to categorize redirects that have "(disambiguation)" in their title.}}}}[[Category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded disambiguation templates]]
[[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]]
}}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R to disambiguation page
  |name={{c|Redirects to disambiguation pages|To a disambiguation page}}
  |to=a disambiguation page
  |info=This redirect is intended for use in links from other articles that need to refer to the disambiguation page, rather than be disambiguated.  Therefore, '''this template should only appear on a redirect page that has "(disambiguation)" at the end of its title'''.  Ambiguous titles that do not have  page names ending with "(disambiguation)" should use {{tl|R from ambiguous term}} instead. For disambiguations that later prove to still be ambiguous (e.g. "(painter)" when there are multiple notable painters by the same name) and which redirect to disambiguation pages, then {{tl|R from incomplete disambiguation}} is the appropriate rcat template.
  |printworthy=no
}}<includeonly>{{Talk other|{{Incorrect redirect template|[[Help:Talk pages|talk]]||outside}}
|{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{#invoke:string|endswith|{{PAGENAME}}|(disambiguation)}}|[[Category:Redirects to disambiguation pages]]|{{Mbox|type=content|image=[[File:Stop hand orange.svg|50px]]|text={{Error|The above [[WP:RCAT|rcat]] should only be used to categorize redirects that have "(disambiguation)" in their title.}}}}[[Category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded disambiguation templates]]
[[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]]
}}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] 
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 5 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to disambiguation page |name={{c|Redirects to disambiguation pages|To a disambiguation page}} |to=a disambiguation page |info=This redirect is intended for use in links from other articles that need to refer to the disambiguation page, rather than be disambiguated. Therefore, '''this template should only appear on a redirect page that has "(disambiguation)" at the end of its title'''. Ambiguous titles that do not have page names ending with "(disambiguation)" should use {{tl|R from ambiguous term}} instead. For disambiguations that later prove to still be ambiguous (e.g. "(painter)" when there are multiple notable painters by the same name) and which redirect to disambiguation pages, then {{tl|R from incomplete disambiguation}} is the appropriate rcat template. |printworthy=no }}<includeonly>{{Talk other|{{Incorrect redirect template|[[Help:Talk pages|talk]]||outside}} |{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{#invoke:string|endswith|{{PAGENAME}}|(disambiguation)}}||{{Mbox|type=content|image=[[File:Stop hand orange.svg|50px]]|text={{Error|The above [[WP:RCAT|rcat]] should only be used to categorize redirects that have "(disambiguation)" in their title.}}}}[[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]]}}}} }}</includeonly><noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Redirects to disambiguation pages]] [[Category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded disambiguation templates]] [[Category:pages from wikipedia]] [[Category:pages from wikipedia]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R to disambiguation page
  |name={{c|Redirects to disambiguation pages|To a disambiguation page}}
  |to=a disambiguation page
  |info=This redirect is intended for use in links from other articles that need to refer to the disambiguation page, rather than be disambiguated.  Therefore, '''this template should only appear on a redirect page that has "(disambiguation)" at the end of its title'''.  Ambiguous titles that do not have  page names ending with "(disambiguation)" should use {{tl|R from ambiguous term}} instead. For disambiguations that later prove to still be ambiguous (e.g. "(painter)" when there are multiple notable painters by the same name) and which redirect to disambiguation pages, then {{tl|R from incomplete disambiguation}} is the appropriate rcat template.
  |printworthy=no
}}<includeonly>{{Talk other|{{Incorrect redirect template|[[Help:Talk pages|talk]]||outside}}
|{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{#invoke:string|endswith|{{PAGENAME}}|(disambiguation)}}||{{Mbox|type=content|image=[[File:Stop hand orange.svg|50px]]|text={{Error|The above [[WP:RCAT|rcat]] should only be used to categorize redirects that have "(disambiguation)" in their title.}}}}[[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]]}}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] 

[[Category:Redirects to disambiguation pages]]
[[Category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded disambiguation templates]]
[[Category:pages from wikipedia]]
[[Category:pages from wikipedia]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R to disambiguation page
  |name={{c|Redirects to disambiguation pages|To a disambiguation page}}
  |to=a disambiguation page
  |info=This redirect is intended for use in links from other articles that need to refer to the disambiguation page, rather than be disambiguated.  Therefore, '''this template should only appear on a redirect page that has "(disambiguation)" at the end of its title'''.  Ambiguous titles that do not have  page names ending with "(disambiguation)" should use {{tl|R from ambiguous term}} instead. For disambiguations that later prove to still be ambiguous (e.g. "(painter)" when there are multiple notable painters by the same name) and which redirect to disambiguation pages, then {{tl|R from incomplete disambiguation}} is the appropriate rcat template.
  |printworthy=no
}}<includeonly>{{Talk other|{{Incorrect redirect template|[[Help:Talk pages|talk]]||outside}}
|{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{#invoke:string|endswith|{{PAGENAME}}|(disambiguation)}}||{{Mbox|type=content|image=[[File:Stop hand orange.svg|50px]]|text={{Error|The above [[WP:RCAT|rcat]] should only be used to categorize redirects that have "(disambiguation)" in their title.}}}}[[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]]}}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>

{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] 

[[Category:Redirects to disambiguation pages]]
[[Category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded disambiguation templates]]
[[Category:pages from wikipedia]]
[[Category:pages from wikipedia]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
